title: TrueBlock Realism
description: TrueBlock Realism is a clean, realistic Minecraft resource pack focused on seamless tiling, consistent materials, and shader-ready design.
body:
TrueBlock Realism

A realistic Minecraft resource pack focused on clean materials, seamless tiling, and visual consistency.

Designed to enhance immersion without overwhelming the game every texture is built to feel natural, readable, and part of a cohesive world.

Design Philosophy
-Realistic, but not noisy
-Clean tiling with no visible seams
-Consistent materials across all blocks
-Designed for shaders (Iris + Complementary recommended)
-Built as a complete system, not individual textures

Pack Details
-Resolution: 128x
-Version: Java Edition 1.21+
-Shader Support: Yes (Iris recommended)
-PBR Support: In development

This pack uses AI to generate base materials, combined with manual refinement, seam correction, and in-game testing.

The result is faster iteration without sacrificing quality or consistency.

Support the Project

Want the full experience?

Higher resolution, early access, and future PBR features are available on Patreon.

https://www.patreon.com/cw/TrueBlockStudio
